cells.rationale: Exact teardown identity, atomic control publication, and terminal-path ordering form subtle cross-file correctness invariants.
The durable state machine combines atomic admission, bounded recovery, and race-safe cancellation with high-blast-radius correctness invariants.
Versioned RPC evolution and recursive concurrent cancellation require architectural changes with subtle isolation and settlement invariants.
Adapting the protocol while preserving public Task and AbortError semantics across races is contract-shaped correctness-critical work.
This cross-cutting workflow redesign must enforce non-forgeable ownership, launch cardinality, and equivalent generated agent behavior.
The rollout gate must safely validate exact process ownership and cleanup across injected, slow, operator, and documentation surfaces.
